signals.headline: XRP Joins Bitcoin, Ethereum, and Solana on SoFi Bank's Crypto Platform | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
XRP Joins Bitcoin, Ethereum, and Solana on SoFi Bank's Crypto Platform | YES | HIGH confidence**  
SoFi Bank added XRP to its platform alongside Bitcoin, Ethereum, and Solana, enhancing mainstream retail access.[2]  
Confirmed integration resolves prior exclusion debates, potentially shifting prediction markets on altcoin listings (no direct BTC/ETH impact but broadens ecosystem momentum).
